hero.title: Get Cited By
hero.description: Be the answer ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews give. We optimize your content to be discovered, understood, and cited by generative AI search engines.

services.title: Complete AI Search Optimization
services.subtitle: We help your brand become the trusted source AI engines cite and recommend.

contentStructuring.title: Content Structuring
contentStructuring.description: Restructure your content into clear, citable, well-formatted answers that AI models can easily parse and reference.

schemaMarkup.description: Implement advanced structured data markup that gives AI crawlers the context they need to cite you accurately.

process.title: How We Get You Cited
process.subtitle: A proven methodology for earning visibility inside AI-generated answers.

step1.title: AI Visibility Audit
step1.description: We analyze how your brand currently appears (or doesn't) across major AI search engines and identify quick wins.

step2.title: Content & Schema Optimization
step2.description: We restructure existing content and implement structured data to make it machine-readable and citation-ready.

step3.title: Authority Building
step3.description: We strengthen entity signals and third-party mentions that AI models use to validate trustworthiness.

step4.title: Monitor & Iterate
step4.description: We track citations across every major AI engine and continuously refine content based on performance data.
